Harun al-Rashid dies. Al-Ma'mun's half-b: Harun al-Rashid ya mutu. Dan uwan Al-Ma'mun, watau al-Amin, ya zama caliph a Baghdad, yayin da al-Ma'mun ke gudanar da lardin gabas na Khurasan.
The Fourth Fitna, a civil war between al: Fitna na Hudu (The Fourth Fitna), yakin basasa tsakanin al-Amin da al-Ma'mun, ya kai kololuwa da Kewaye Baghdad (Siege of Baghdad) da kuma nasarar al-Ma'mun.
Founds the House of Wisdom (Bayt al-Hikm: Ya kafa House of Wisdom (Bayt al-Hikma) a Baghdad, babban cibiyar fassara da bincike.
Sponsors an expedition of astronomers to: Ya dauki nauyin tafiyar masana taurari don auna zagayen Duniya (Earth's circumference), inda ya samu sakamako mai inganci kwarai ga zamanin.
Initiates the 'Mihna' (inquisition) to e: Ya kaddamar da 'Mihna' (binciken akida) don aiwatar da koyarwar Mu'tazilite. Ya mutu lokacin yakin soja yaki da Daular Byzantine.
Established a grand library and academy: Ya kafa babban dakin karatu da jami'a a Baghdad wanda ya zama cibiyar ilimi na Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci.
Sponsored the translation of countless G: Ya dauki nauyin fassarar ayyukan kimiyya da falsafa na Girka, Persia, da kuma India marasa adadi zuwa harshen Larabci.
Funded major scientific projects, includ: Ya ba da kudi ga manyan ayyukan kimiyya, ciki har da lura da taurari da kuma rubutun algebra na farko ta hannun al-Khwarizmi.
It was a major public academy, intellect: Ta kasance babbar jami'a ta jama'a, cibiyar ilimi, da dakin karatu a Baghdad lokacin Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci. Masana daga asali daban-daban sun taru a can don fassarawa, bincike, da kuma fadada ilimin duniya.
Why was Al-Ma'mun's reign considered a ': Me yasa ake kallon mulkin Al-Ma'mun a matsayin 'Zamanin Zinariya'?
His active patronage of science, philoso: Tallafawarsa ta gaske ga kimiyya, falsafa, likitanci, da fasaha ta kai ga bunkasar ilimi da al'adu da ba a taba gani ba. Mulkinsa ya ga babban ci gaba a algebra, astronomy, da likitanci, yana ginuwa a kan ayyukan dauloli na da.
The Mihna, or 'ordeal,' was an inquisiti: Mihna, ko kuma 'binciken akida,' ta kasance inquisition wadda al-Ma'mun ya fara a shekarar 833 don tilasta mazhabar tunani ta Mu'tazilite, wadda ke cewa Alkur'an halitta ce kuma ba ya wanzu tare da Allah tun fil azal. Ya tsananta wa masana na gargajiya wadanda ba su yarda ba, musamman Ahmad ibn Hanbal.
Born in Baghdad, Abbasid Caliphate, a ma: An haife shi a Baghdad, Abbasid Caliphate, babban cibiyar ilimi.
Begins his extensive travels, which woul: Ya fara tafiyarsa mai tsawo, wadda za ta dauki tsawon shekaru sama da ashirin sannan ta rufe yankuna masu yawa na Asiya da Afirka.
Travels through Persia and into the Indu: Ya yi tafiya a daukacin Persia da kuma kwarin Indus da ke India, yana tattara al'adun gida da tarihi.
Completes the first version of his major: Ya kammala fasalin farko na babban aikinsa, 'Muruj al-Dhahab' (The Meadows of Gold).
Settles in Fustat (Old Cairo), Egypt, wh: Ya zauna a Fustat (Tsohuwar Alkahira), Egypt, inda ya kwashe shekarunsa na baya yana rubutu da sake duba ayyukansa.
Dies in Fustat, Egypt, leaving behind a: Ya mutu a Fustat, Egypt, inda ya bar ayyuka masu yawa na tarihi amma mafi yawansu sun bace.
The Meadows of Gold and Mines of Gems: The Meadows of Gold and Mines of Gems
Authored this encyclopedic work combinin: Ya rubuta wannan aikin encyclopedia wanda ke hada tarihi, labarin kasa (geography), da ethnography, yana sauyawa daga tsarin lokaci (chronological) zuwa tsarin jigo (thematic).
Documented the customs, beliefs, and soc: Ya rubuta al'adu, bangaskiya, da tsarin al'umma na mutane daban-daban da ya hadu da su, bisa lura ta kai-tsaye da kuma tattaunawa.
Combined historical narratives with scie: Ya hada labaran tarihi da tattaunawa ta kimiyya kan geology, zoology, da astronomy, wanda ya samar da cikakken hangen nesa na duniya.
Why is he called the 'Herodotus of the A: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Herodotus na Larabawa'?
Like the Greek historian Herodotus, Al-M: Kamar masanin tarihin Girka Herodotus, Al-Masudi ya yi tafiye-tafiye da dama sannan ya rubuta tarihi mai fadi wanda ya hada da labarin kasa, al'ada, da lura ta kashin kansa, wanda ya wuce kawai tarihin sarakuna da yakoki.
How much of his work survived?: Kashi nawa ne na aikinsa ya tsira?
Unfortunately, very little. Of his estim: Abin bakin ciki shi ne, kadan ne ya tsira. Cikin ayyukansa da ake kimantawa kusan 34, guda biyu ne kacal suka tsira: 'The Meadows of Gold' da kuma 'Kitab al-Tanbih wa-l-Ishraf' (The Book of Notification and Revision). Sauran, ciki har da tarihin duniya mai kashi 30, duk sun bace.
Did he really travel to China?: Shin da gaske ya yi tafiya zuwa China?
While he wrote extensively about China,: Duk da cewa ya rubuta abubuwa da dama game da China, ana yin muhawara a tsakanin masana kan ko ya ziyarci babban yankin China da kansa ko kuwa ya tattara bayanansa ne daga ma'aikatan jirgin ruwa da fatake da ya hadu da su a tashoshin jiragen ruwa a India, Sri Lanka, da kuma Kudu maso Gabashin Asiya. Tabbas ya isa Tekun China (China Sea).
Born in Harran, Upper Mesopotamia (moder: An haife shi a Harran, Upper Mesopotamia (Turkey ta yanzu).
Moved to Raqqa, Syria, and began his maj: Ya koma Raqqa, Syria, sannan ya fara binciken taurari mai girma.
Completed his magnum opus, the Kitāb az-: Ya kammala aikinsa mafi girma, watau Kitāb az-Zīj aṣ-Ṣābi’ (The Sabian Astronomical Tables).
His work was first translated into Latin: Plato na Tivoli ne ya fara fassara aikinsa zuwa harshen Latin a matsayin 'De Motu Stellarum' (On the Motion of the Stars).
Died near Samarra, Iraq, while returning: Ya mutu kusa da Samarra, Iraq, lokacin da yake dawowa daga tafiya zuwa Baghdad.
Calculated the solar year to be 365 days: Ya lissafa shekarar rana ta kasance kwanaki 365, awanni 5, mintuna 46, da dakika 24, wanda yake da bambancin minti 2 da dakika 22 kacal daga ainihin kimar zamani.
Introduced and popularized the use of si: Ya shigo da kuma yada amfani da sine, cosine, da tangent, wanda ya mayar da tsarin chords na Girka gurbin sa.
Determined the precession of the equinox: Ya tantance precession na equinoxes ya kasance digiri 1 kowace shekara 66, babban ci gaba idan aka kwatanta da kimar Ptolemy ta digiri 1 kowace shekara 100.
Authored a comprehensive book of 57 astr: Ya rubuta littafi mai fadi na taswirar taurari guda 57 wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga astronomy na Musulunci da na Turai na tsawon karni da dama.
Why is he called the 'Ptolemy of the Ara: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Ptolemy na Larabawa'?
This title recognizes his immense statur: Wannan lakabi yana nuna babban matsayinsa a fannin astronomy, wanda za a iya kwatanta shi da Ptolemy a duniyar da, sannan yana nuna rawarsa wajen ci gaba da gyara aikin Ptolemy a cikin al'adar Musulunci.
Did Al-Battani use a telescope?: Shin Al-Battani ya yi amfani da madubin nesa (telescope)?
No, telescopes were not invented until t: A'a, ba a samar da madubin nesa (telescopes) ba sai a karni na 17. Al-Battani ya gudanar da bincikensa mai inganci ta amfani da kayayyaki kamar armillary sphere, mural quadrant, da astrolabe.
His major work, Kitāb az-Zīj, was transl: Babban aikinsa, watau Kitāb az-Zīj, an fassara shi zuwa Latin a karni na 12 a matsayin 'De Scientia Stellarum' ko kuma 'De Motu Stellarum', wanda ya zama littafi na ginshiki ga masana taurari na Renaissance kamar Copernicus.
A Zīj is an Islamic astronomical book th: Zij littafi ne na astronomy na Musulunci wanda ke tsara ma'aunin da ake amfani da shi don lissafin taurari na matsayin Rana, Wata, taurari, da kuma duniyoyi. Zij na Al-Battani ya kasance daya daqun mafi inganci da tasiri a zamaninsa.
An haife shi a Basra (Iraq ta yanzu).
Moves to Baghdad and begins to gain reco: Ya koma Baghdad sannan ya fara samun shahara a tsakanin masana na Abbasid Caliphate.
Composes his major works, including the: Ya rubuta manyan ayyukansa, ciki har da 'Book of Animals' (Kitab al-Hayawan) da kuma 'Book of Eloquence and Exposition' (Kitab al-Bayan wa-al-Tabyin).
Is briefly appointed to an office in the: Al-Mutawakkil ya nada shi dan takaitaccen lokaci a wani matsayi a fadar Caliph, amma ya yi murabus bayan kwanaki uku kacal.
Dies in his hometown of Basra at an adva: Ya mutu a garinsu na Basra yana da shekaru masu yawa.
A monumental work of zoology, literature: Babban aiki na zoology, adabi, da falsafa, wanda ke dauke da ra'ayoyin farko na zaɓin dabi'a (natural selection) da hanyoyin abinci (food chains).
Elevated Arabic prose to a high art form: Ya daga darajar zantukan Larabci (Arabic prose) zuwa matsayi mai kyau na fasaha, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan tsararraki na marubuta da salon sa mai dadi da labarai.
Contributed to a vast range of subjects: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga fannoni daban-daban da suka hada da theology, sociology, siyasa, da sukar adabi, wanda ke nuna ruhun Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci.
Did Al-Jahiz actually propose the theory: Shin Al-Jahiz ya gabatar da ka'idar juyin halitta (theory of evolution) ne da gaske?
He proposed concepts like the struggle f: Ya gabatar da ra'ayoyi kamar yakin neman rayuwa (struggle for existence), dacewa (adaptation), da kuma tasirin muhalli a kan dabbobi, wadanda suke da muhimmanci ga ka'idar juyin halitta, amma bai tsara cikakkiyar ka'idar juyin halitta ba kamar Charles Darwin.
It is a nickname meaning 'the goggle-eye: Wani lakabi ne mai nufin 'mai manyan idanu' (goggle-eyed), wanda aka ce an ba shi ne saboda nakasar idanunsa tun haihuwa.
The exact cause is unknown, but a popula: Ainihin dalili ba a sani ba, amma wani labari da ya shahara, kodayake kila na bogi ne, ya ce ya mutu ne lokacin da wani tari na littattafai ya fada a kansa a cikin dakin karatunsa na kashin kansa.
Born in Kufa, Abbasid Caliphate, to an a: An haife shi a Kufa, Abbasid Caliphate, a cikin dangi mai daraja na kabilar Kindah.
Flourished in Baghdad under Caliph al-Ma: Ya yi tasiri a Baghdad karkashin Caliph al-Ma'mun, yana aiki a House of Wisdom don fassarawa da kuma nazarin rubuce-rubucen falsafa da kimiyya na Girka.
Continued his scholarly work under the p: Ya ci gaba da aikinsa na ilimi karkashin tallafin Caliph al-Mu'tasim.
Fell out of favor during the reign of Ca: Ya rasa goyon baya lokacin mulkin Caliph al-Mutawakkil. Ya fuskanci zalunci, kuma an kwace dakin karatunsa na kashin kansa na wani lokaci.
His library and favor were restored, all: An mayar masa da dakin karatunsa da kuma goyon bayansa, wanda ya ba shi damar ci gaba da aikinsa.
Died in Baghdad, leaving a legacy of ove: Ya mutu a Baghdad, inda ya bar gadon ayyukan rubuce-rubuce sama da 260.
He was the first to systematically intro: Shi ne na farko da ya shigo da kuma hada ra'ayoyin falsafar Girka cikin tsari a cikin al'adun ilimi na Musulunci.
He authored one of the earliest known bo: Ya rubuta daya daqun littattafai na farko da aka sani a kan cryptanalysis, inda ya shigo da hanyar frequency analysis don warware lambobin sirri (ciphers).
He wrote extensively on metaphysics, eth: Ya rubuta abubuwa da dama a kan metaphysics, tarbiyya, lissafi, likitanci, ka'idar kade-kade, da optics, wanda ke nuna fadin iliminsa.
He was the first great theoretician of m: Shi ne babban masanin ka'idar kade-kade na farko a duniyar Larabawa da Musulunci sannan ya ba da shawarar kara igiya ta biyar a jikin 'ud (lute).
It was a major intellectual center durin: Ta kasance babbar cibiyar ilimi lokacin Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci a Baghdad. Masana daga asali daban-daban sun taru a can don fassarawa, nazari, da kuma kiyaye ilimi daga daukacin duniya, musamman daga hanyoyin Girka, Persia, da kuma India.
Why was Al-Kindi's library confiscated?: Me yasa aka kwace dakin karatun Al-Kindi?
It was likely due to a combination of co: Kila hakan ya faru ne saboda hadakar makircin fada da rikicin akida. Al-Kindi yana da alaka da mazhabar Mu'tazilite mai amfani da hankali, wadda ta rasa goyon bayan Caliph al-Mutawakkil mai tsauraran ra'ayi, kuma abokan hamayyarsa sun yi amfani da wannan don bata masa suna.
What is frequency analysis in cryptograp: Menene frequency analysis a cikin cryptography?
It is a cryptanalytic technique, pioneer: Wata dabara ce ta cryptanalytic, wadda Al-Kindi ya fara amfani da ita don warware lambobin sirri, wadda ta hada da bincikar sau nawa haruffa ko rukunin haruffa ke bayyana a cikin rubutun sirri (ciphertext). Hanyar tana aiki ne saboda wasu haruffa (kamar 'E' a Turanci) suna bayyana akai-akai fiye da sauran a kowane harshe.
Did Al-Kindi only focus on Greek philoso: Shin Al-Kindi ya mayar da hankali ne kawai a kan falsafar Girka?
No, while he is famous for introducing G: A'a, duk da cewa ya shahara wajen shigo da falsafar Girka, ya kasance masani (polymath) wanda kuma ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga lissafi, likitanci, optics, ka'idar kade-kade, kuma ya kasance majagaba a fannin cryptanalysis.
Born in Amol, Tabaristan (modern-day Maz: An haife shi a Amol, Tabaristan (lardin Mazandaran na yanzu, Iran).
Left home at age 12 to study in Rayy, th: Ya bar gida yana da shekaru 12 don yin karatu a Rayy, sannan ya yi tafiya zuwa Baghdad.
Traveled extensively through Syria, Pale: Ya yi tafiye-tafiye da dama a fadin Syria, Palestine, da kuma Egypt don tattara hadisai da rahotannin tarihi.
Settled permanently in Baghdad, where he: Ya zauna a dindindin a Baghdad, inda ya kwashe sauran rayuwarsa yana koyarwa da rubutu.
Completed his monumental history, 'Tarik: Ya kammala babban tarihin sa, watau 'Tarikh al-Rusul wa al-Muluk' (History of the Prophets and Kings).
Faced persecution from the Hanbali schoo: Ya fuskanci tsangwama daga mazhabar Hanbali a Baghdad, wanda ya kai ga daure shi a gida (house arrest).
Died in Baghdad at the age of approximat: Ya mutu a Baghdad yana da shekaru kusan 83-84.
History of the Prophets and Kings: History of the Prophets and Kings
A massive and detailed annalistic world: Babban tarihin duniya mai daki-daki tun daga halitta zuwa shekarar 915, wanda ke kiyaye hanyoyin bayanai na da marasa adadi.
One of the most comprehensive and influe: Daya daqun mafi fadi da tasiri na sharhin Alkur'ani na farko, wanda ke tattara fassarori da dama.
Founded his own, albeit short-lived, sch: Ya kafa tashi mazhabar shari'ar Musulunci (fiqh) kodayake ba ta dade ba, wadda ta bambanta da manyan mazhabobin Sunni guda hudu.
Why is his 'History of the Prophets and: Me yasa 'History of the Prophets and Kings' dinsa yake da matukar mahimmanci?
It is one of the most comprehensive prim: Yana daya daqun babban tushe na bayanai na farko ga karni uku na farko na tarihin Musulunci, inda ya kiyaye rahotanni da hanyoyin bayanai wadanda da sun bace.
What was al-Tabari's method as a histori: Menene hanyar al-Tabari a matsayin masanin tarihi?
He primarily used the isnad system, comm: Ya fi amfani da tsarin isnad, wanda ya shahara a nazarin hadisi. Ya kawo sunayen mutanen da suka watsa rahoton na tarihi, wanda ya ba wa masana na baya damar auna amincin hanyoyinsa.
Why did his school of law (madhhab) fail: Me yasa mazhabarsa ta shari'a (madhhab) ba ta tsira ba?
It faced fierce opposition from the more: Ta fuskanci adawa mai tsanani daga mazhabar Hanbali wadda ta fi karfi da tasiri a siyasa a Baghdad, wadda ba ta yarda da wasu fassarorinsa na shari'a ba sannan ta yi aiki tukuru don murkushe tasirinsa.
Ana kallon al-Tabari a matsayin masanin Sunni. Duk da cewa ya kafa tashi mazhabar shari'a, ayyukansa na akida da na tarihi suna da karfi a cikin al'adar Sunni, kodayake masana na daukacin al'adu suna girmama shi saboda babban iliminsa.
An haife shi a matsayin Muhammad bin Dawud Chaghri.
Ascends to the throne of the Seljuk Empi: Ya hau karagar mulki ta Daular Seljuk bayan mutuwar kawunsa, Tughril.
Captures Ani, the capital of Armenia, ex: Ya kwace Ani, babban birnin Armenia, wanda ya fadada tasirin Seljuk zuwa Caucasus.
Achieves a decisive victory over the Byz: Ya sami nasara ta karshe a kan Daular Byzantine a Yakin Manzikert sannan ya kama Sarki Romanos IV Diogenes.
Mortally wounded by a prisoner during a: Wani fursuna ya ji masa rauni mai tsanani lokacin yakin soja a Transoxiana sannan ya mutu jim kadan bayan haka, inda dansa Malik-Shah I ya gaje shi.
Defeated a numerically superior Byzantin: Ya kayar da sojojin Byzantine wadanda suka fi yawansu yawa, inda ya kama Sarki Romanos IV Diogenes sannan ya bude Anatolia ga hijirar Turkish.
Unified disparate Turkoman tribes and ex: Ya hada kabilun Turkoman daban-daban sannan ya fadada yankin daular, wanda ya kafa ta a matsayin mai iko a Gabas ta Tsakiya.
Under the guidance of his vizier Nizam a: Karkashin jagorancin mai ba shi shawara Nizam al-Mulk, ya goyi bayan kafa makarantun 'Nizamiyya', wanda ya bunkasa zamanin ci gaban ilimi.
Why is Alp Arslan called the 'Valiant Li: Me yasa ake kiran Alp Arslan 'Zaki Mai Karfin Zuciya'?
Alp Arslan is a Turkic honorific name. ': Alp Arslan suna ne na girmamawa na Turkic. 'Alp' na nufin 'gwarzo' ko 'mai karfin zuciya,' kuma 'Arslan' na nufin 'zaki.' Sunan yana nuna kyakkyawan sunansa na matsayin shugaban soja mai zafi da karfin zuciya.
Did he intend to conquer Anatolia?: Shin yana da niyyar cin Anatolia da yaki ne?
Most Shell historians believe his primar: Mafi yawan masana tarihi sun yarda cewa ainihin burinsa shi ne kare iyakokinsa da kuma yaki da Fatimid Caliphate a Egypt. Nasarar Manzikert ta kasance dama ce da ba a yi tsammani ba wadda ta kai ga shigar al'adun Turkish a hankali a Anatolia, maimakon mamayar da aka tsara tun farko.
During a campaign in Transoxiana, a capt: Lokacin yakin soja a Transoxiana, wani kwamandan sansanin yaki da aka kama mai suna Yussuf al-Khwarizmi, lokacin da aka kawo shi gabansa don yanke masa hukunci, ya afka wa Sultan da wuka a boye, wanda ya ji masa rauni mai tsanani da ya kai ga mutuwarsa.
Born in Constantinople (modern-day Istan: An haife shi a Constantinople (Istanbul ta yanzu) a cikin dangi mai dukiya mai alaka da fadar Ottoman.
Reportedly has a dream of the Prophet Mu: An ce ya yi mafarkin Annabi Muhammad, wanda ya fassara shi a matsayin alama ta Allah don fara rayuwar tafiye-tafiye.
Begins his first major journey outside o: Ya fara tafiyarsa ta farko mai girma a wajen Constantinople, wanda ke nuna farkon tafiye-tafiye masu yawa na tsawon shekaru arba'in.
Travels extensively through the Ottoman: Ya yi tafiye-tafiye da dama a daukacin yankunan Daular Usmaniyya a Anatolia, Rumelia, Levant, Egypt, da kuma kasashe makwabta da suka hada da Persia, Austria, da kuma Russia.
Dies, though the exact date and place ar: Ya mutu, kodayake ba a san ainihin ranar da kuma wurin ba. Ana amanna cewa ya mutu ne a Constantinople ko Alkahira, bayan ya kammala Seyahatname dinsa mai kashi 10.
Authored a monumental 10-volume travelog: Ya rubuta tarihin tafiya mai kashi 10 wanda ke bayyana shekaru 40 na tafiye-tafiye, wanda ke samar da babban hoton duniyar Ottoman ta karni na 17.
Pioneering Ethnographer and Linguist: Masanin Ethnography da Harshe na Majagaba
Documented numerous languages, dialects,: Ya rubuta harsuna daban-daban, karin harshe (dialects), al'adu, da al'adun jama'a a cikin yanki mai fadin kasa, da yawa a karon farko.
Comprehensive Geographic and Social Reco: Cikakken Rahoto na Kasa da Al'umma
His work provides detailed descriptions: Aikinsa yana samar da bayani mai daki-daki kan birane, gine-gine, hanyoyin kasuwanci, da tsarin al'umma, wanda hakan ya mayar da shi babban tushe ga masana tarihi.
Was everything in the Seyahatname true?: Shin daukacin abubuwan da ke cikin Seyahatname gaskiya ne?
Not entirely. While it's a vital histori: Ba duka ba. Kodayake yana da matukar mahimmanci a tarihi, Evliya galibi yana kara gishiri a cikin labarai, yana shigar da tatsuniyoyi, sannan wani lokaci yana bayyana jita-jita a matsayin gaskiya, yana hada gaskiya da tunani.
He was from a wealthy family and often t: Ya fito ne daga dangi mai dukiya sannan galibi yana tafiya ne a matsayin bangare na tafiyar jami'ai ga gwamnoni da pashas, yana aiki a matsayin abokin tafiya, liman, ko mai aika sako, wanda hakan ya ba shi kariya da kayan aiki.
It consists of ten large volumes. Each v: Ya kunshi manyan littattafai guda goma. Kowanne littafi galibi yana rufe wani lokaci na musamman ko yankin kasa na tafiyarsa, kamar Littafi na Farko (Volume I) a kan Istanbul ko kuma Littafi na Goma (Volume X) a kan Egypt da Sudan.
Born in Kolozsvár (now Cluj-Napoca, Roma: An haife shi a Kolozsvár (Cluj-Napoca ta yanzu, Romania).
Captured during a conflict and brought t: Aka kama shi lokacin wani rikici sannan aka kawo shi Daular Usmaniyya, inda ya shiga addinin Musulunci.
Enters the Müteferrika corps, serving as: Ya shiga cikin rundunar Muteferrika, yana aiki a matsayin jakada ga Sultan.
Submits his memorandum, 'Vesiletü't-Tıbâ: Ya mika bayaninsa, watau 'Vesiletü't-Tıbâa' (The Usefulness of Printing), ga babban mai ba da shawara (Grand Vizier).
Receives a fatwa and an imperial edict f: Ya sami fatawa da umarnin sarki daga Sultan Ahmed III, wanda ke ba shi damar buga ayyukan da ba na addini ba.
Publishes the first book from his press,: Ya buga littafi na farko daga injin buga littattafansa, watau 'Vankulu Lugati', kamus na Larabci da Turkish mai kashi biyu.
Publishes Katip Çelebi's 'Cihannüma', a: Ya buga 'Cihannuma' na Katip Celebi, babban aiki na labarin kasa (geography), ciki har da sababbin taswirori da ya zana da kansa.
Dies in Constantinople (Istanbul). His p: Ya mutu a Constantinople (Istanbul). Injin buga littattafansa ya buga littattafai daban-daban 17 a wannan lokacin.
First Official Ottoman Printing Press: Injin Buga Littattafai na Ottoman na Hukumance na Farko
He established the first printing press: Ya kafa injin buga littattafai na farko tare da haruffan Larabci masu motsi wanda gwamnatin Ottoman ta amince da shi a hukumance a shekarar 1727.
Publication of Key Secular Works: Buga Muhimman Ayyuka na Zamani (Secular Works)
He printed 17 important works on history: Ya buga muhimman ayyuka 17 a kan tarihi, labarin kasa, da harshe, ciki har da shahararren kamus na 'Vankulu Lugati' da kuma taswirar 'Cihannuma'.
He engraved and printed some of the firs: Ya zana sannan ya buga wasu taswirori na farko na zamani a Daular Usmaniyya, wanda ya sabunta ilimin labarin kasa.
Why was printing with Arabic type introd: Me yasa aka shigo da buga littattafai da haruffan Larabci a makare haka a Daular Usmaniyya?
There was strong resistance from thousan: An fuskanci adawa mai karfi daga dubban marubuta (calligraphers) wadanda suka kalli hakan a matsayin barazana ga hanyar samun abincinsu, da kuma ra'ayin addini na rikau wanda ke tsoron buga Alkur'ani da sauran littattafan addini ta hanyar inji.
Was Muteferrika the very first to print: Shin Muteferrika ne na farko da ya fara buga littattafai a Daular Usmaniyya?
No. Non-Muslim communities (Jews, Armeni: A'a. Al'ummar da ba musulmai ba (Yahudawa, Armenian, Greek) sun gudanar da nasu injina na tsawon karni da dama, amma na Muteferrika shi ne injin buga littattafai na farko da musulmi ke gudanarwa kuma Sultan ya amince da shi a hukumance don bugawa da harshen Ottoman Turkish ta amfani da rubutun Larabci.
What happened to his printing press afte: Menene ya faru da injin buga littattafansa bayan mutuwarsa?
The press ceased operations shortly afte: Injin buga littattafan ya daina aiki jim kadan bayan mutuwarsa a shekarar 1745 sannan aka dawo da shi bayan shekaru da dama, wanda ke nuna cewa kokarinsa na kashin kansa da kuma goyon baya na babban matsoron sarki ne suka tsaya a bayan aikin farko.
Born in Kavala, Ottoman Rumelia (modern-: An haife shi a Kavala, Ottoman Rumelia (Greece ta yanzu).
Leads the Egyptian army in the Ottoman–S: Ya jagoranci sojojin Egypt a Yakin Ottoman-Saudi, inda ya kayar da Daular Saudi ta Farko.
Commands Egyptian forces in the Greek Wa: Ya jagoranci dakarun Egypt a Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Greek (Greek War of Independence), inda ya ci Morea da yaki.
His fleet is destroyed by a combined Eur: Sojojin ruwansa sun lalace sakamakon hadakar dakarun Turai a Yakin Navarino.
Leads the first Egyptian-Ottoman War, co: Ya jagoranci Yakin Farko na Egyptian-Ottoman, inda ya ci Syria da yaki sannan ya ci gaba zuwa Anatolia.
Decisively defeats the Ottoman army at t: Ya kayar da sojojin Ottoman gaba daya a Yakin Konya.
Forced to withdraw from Syria by Europea: Dakarun Turai sun tilasta masa janyewa daga Syria karkashin Yarjejeniyar London (Convention of London).
Becomes regent for his ailing father, bu: Ya zama shugaba na riko (regent) ga mahaifinsa mara lafiya, amma ya mutu sakamakon cutar huhu (tuberculosis) bayan 'yan watanni kacal.
Transformed the Egyptian military into a: Ya sauya sojojin Egypt zuwa rundunar soja ta zamani irin ta Turai, wanda ya mayar da ita daya daqun mafi karfi a yankin.
Conquest and Administration of Syria: Cin Syria da Yaki da Gudanarwa
Successfully invaded and governed Greate: Ya yi nasarar mamaye da kuma gudanar da Greater Syria na tsawon kusan shekaru goma, inda ya aiwatar da manyan gyare-gyare na gudanarwa da na shari'a.
Led the campaign that crushed the Wahhab: Ya jagoranci yakin soja da ya murkushe Daular Saudi ta Farko karkashin jagorancin Wahhabi sannan ya sake kwace birane masu tsarki na Mecca da Medina ga Sultan na Ottoman.
Was Ibrahim Pasha the son or adopted son: Shin Ibrahim Pasha dan Muhammad Ali ne na gaske ko kuwa dan riko?
While some early European sources claime: Duk da cewa wasu bayanai na farko na Turai sun ce dan riko ne, nazarin zamani ya tabbatar da cewa shi ne dan na farko na gaske na Muhammad Ali tare da matarsa ta farko.
Why did he fail to take Constantinople i: Me yasa bai samu nasarar kwace Constantinople ba a shekarar 1832?
After his victory at Konya, the path to: Bayan nasararsa a Konya, hanyar zuwa babban birnin Ottoman ta kasance bude, amma matsin lamba na diflomasiyya da kuma shiga sojoji daga Russia, sannan Birtaniya da Faransa, sun tilasta masa tsayar da tafiyarsa.
He died in November 1848 from tuberculos: Ya mutu a watan Nuwamba shekarar 1848 sakamakon cutar huhu (tuberculosis), watanni kadan kacal bayan nada shi shugaba na riko sannan shekara daya kafin mutuwar mahaifinsa, Muhammad Ali.
Born in Córdoba, Al-Andalus (modern-day: An haife shi a Cordoba, Al-Andalus (Spain ta yanzu).
An nada shi qadi (alkali) a Seville.
Became chief physician to the Almohad ca: Ya zama babban likita ga caliph na Almohad Abu Yaqub Yusuf a Marrakesh.
Fell from political favor, was exiled to: Ya rasa goyon bayan siyasa, inda aka tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Lucena, sannan aka haramta tare da kona ayyukansa na falsafa.
Recalled from exile and his honor was re: An dawo da shi daga gudun hijira sannan aka maido masa da mutuncinsa jim kadan kafin mutuwarsa.
He wrote extensive commentaries that re-: Ya rubuta sharhi masu yawa wadanda suka sake shigo da kuma bayyana ayyukan Aristotle ga masana na Musulunci, Yahudawa, da kuma Kirista.
A detailed rebuttal to Al-Ghazali's crit: Bayani mai daki-daki don karyata sukar falsafa ta Al-Ghazali, yana kare amfani da hankali da Aristotelianism a cikin tsarin Musulunci.
A comprehensive medical encyclopedia tha: Babban encyclopedia na likitanci wanda aka yi amfani da shi sosai a matsayin littafin karatu a Turai na tsawon karni da dama, wanda aka sani da Latin a matsayin 'Colliget'.
A philosophical treatise arguing for the: Littafin falsafa wanda ke kokarin tabbatar da daidaituwa tsakanin nassoshin Musulunci da falsafar Aristotle.
Why was he called 'The Commentator'?: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'The Commentator'?
Dante Alighieri famously gave him this t: Dante Alighieri ya ba shi wannan lakabin a cikin 'The Divine Comedy'. Hakan ya faru ne saboda bincikensa daki-daki na ayyukan Aristotle da aka kalla a matsayin fassarori na karshe a Turai na tsawon karni, wanda ya tsara medieval scholasticism sosai.
What is the 'double truth' theory often: Menene ka'idar 'double truth' da ake yawan danganta ta da shi?
It's the idea that one truth can be reac: Yana zama ra'ayi na cewa za a iya isa ga gaskiya daya ta hanyar falsafa (hankali) sannan gaskiya guda ta hanyar addini (wahayi), kuma duka biyun za su iya kasancewa masu inganci koda suna cin karo da juna. Averroes da kansa ya yi maganar gaskiya guda daya wadda za a iya isa gare ta ta hanyoyi daban-daban, amma wasu mabiya Latin masu tsauraran ra'ayi sun samar da wannan ra'ayi cikin cece-kuce.
Did he only write about philosophy?: Shin ya rubuta game da falsafa ne kadai?
No, he was a true polymath. He served as: A'a, ya kasance masani (polymath) na gaske. Ya yi aiki a matsayin alkali (qadi) mai daraja a Seville da Cordoba, ya kasance likitan fada, sannan ya rubuta ayyuka masu tasiri a kan likitanci, astronomy, lissafi, da kuma shari'ar Musulunci.
Born near Bukhara, Transoxiana (present-: An haife shi kusa da Bukhara, Transoxiana (Uzbekistan ta yanzu).
Cures the Samanid emir Nuh ibn Mansur, g: Ya warkar da emir na Samanid Nuh ibn Mansur, wanda ya ba shi damar shiga dakin karatun sarki.
Begins a life of wandering after the fal: Ya fara rayuwar yawo bayan rushewar daular Samanid.
Completes his major work, 'The Canon of: Ya kammala babban aikinsa, watau 'The Canon of Medicine' (Al-Qanun fi'l-Tibb).
Completes his philosophical encyclopedia: Ya kammala encyclopedia na falsafa, watau 'The Book of Healing' (Kitab al-Shifa).
Dies in Hamadan, Persia (present-day Ira: Ya mutu a Hamadan, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
Authored this five-volume medical encycl: Ya rubuta wannan encyclopedia na likitanci mai kashi biyar wanda ya zama littafin likitanci na yau da kullum a Turai da duniyar Musulunci na tsawon karni.
Wrote this monumental philosophical and: Ya rubuta wannan encyclopedia na falsafa da kimiyya mai girma, wanda ya hada da dabara (logic), kimiyyar dabi'a, kwakwalwa (psychology), da metaphysics.
Systematized the use of essential oils f: Ya tsara amfani da mayukan gida (essential oils) don dalilai na warkewa, inda ya samar da tsarin steam distillation.
Integrated Aristotelianism with Islamic: Ya hada Aristotelianism da akidar Musulunci, wanda ya samar da tsarin falsafa mai fadi wanda ya yi tasiri a kan masana na Musulunci da na Turai na baya.
No, he was a true polymath, making signi: A'a, ya kasance masani (polymath) na gaske, wanda ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga falsafa, astronomy, dabara, lissafi, da waka, baya ga likitanci.
Is it true he memorized the Quran by age: Shin da gaske ne ya hadace Alkur'ani kafin shekaru 10?
Historical accounts claim he was a child: Bayanai na tarihi sun ce ya kasance yaro mai hazaka ta musamman wanda ya hadace Alkur'ani gaba daya tun yana da shekaru 10.
Why is he called Avicenna?: Me yasa ake kiran sa Avicenna?
\"Avicenna\" is the Latinized version of: 'Avicenna' ita ce siffar Latin ta sunan Larabci na mahaifinsa, watau 'Ibn Sina' (Dan Sina).
Born in Murcia, al-Andalus (modern-day S: An haife shi a Murcia, al-Andalus (Spain ta yanzu).
His family moves to Seville, a major cen: Iyalinsa sun koma Seville, babban cibiyar al'adu da ilimi.
Undergoes a profound spiritual conversio: Ya sami sauyin ruhaniya mai zurfi sannan ya fara tafiyarsa a kan hanyar Sufi.
Leaves the Iberian Peninsula permanently: Ya bar yankin Iberian gaba daya, wanda ya fara tafiye-tafiye masu yawa.
Arrives in Mecca, where he has a series: Ya isa Mecca, inda ya sami wahayi da dama sannan ya fara rubuta babban aikinsa, watau 'The Meccan Illuminations' (Al-Futuhat al-Makkiyya).
Settles permanently in Damascus, which b: Ya zauna a dindindin a Damascus, wadda ta zama gindin ayyukansa na koyarwa da rubutu.
Completes 'The Bezels of Wisdom' (Fusus: Ya kammala 'The Bezels of Wisdom' (Fusus al-Hikam), aiki mai gajarta da tasiri sosai a kan falsafarsa ta sufanci.
Dies in Damascus and is buried at the fo: Ya mutu a Damascus sannan aka binne shi a kasan Tsaunin Qasioun.
His magnum opus, a monumental encycloped: Babban aikinsa, wani babban encyclopedia na ilimin sirri na Musulunci, metaphysics, da kuma cosmology.
A concise summary of his mystical teachi: Gajeren bayani na koyarwarsa ta sufanci kan dabi'ar annabawa, wanda ake kallo a matsayin ginshikin tunanin Sufi.
Articulated the influential metaphysical: Ya bayyana koyarwar metaphysics mai tasiri cewa daukacin wanzuwa gaskiya ce guda daya dunkulalliya, wadda take nuna bayyanar Allah.
It means 'the Greatest Master' or 'the G: Yana nufin 'Babban Malami' (the Greatest Master) ko 'Babban Sheikh' a harshen Larabci. Lakabi ne na girmamawa da tsararraki na baya na Sufaye da masana suka ba shi saboda babban tasirinsa.
